Container.Name: feedBack Demucs Server
Container.Overview: A standalone GPU-accelerated companion server for feedBack. Offloads PyTorch/Demucs stem-splitting, Whisper lyrics alignment, and pitch extraction tasks to a separate CUDA-capable GPU. IMPORTANT GPU PASSTHROUGH INSTRUCTIONS: To enable GPU acceleration, you must have the Unraid NVIDIA Driver plugin installed. Under Docker Advanced View, add the following to your Extra Parameters: --gpus all
Container.Description: A standalone GPU-accelerated companion server for feedBack. Offloads PyTorch/Demucs stem-splitting, Whisper lyrics alignment, and pitch extraction tasks to a separate CUDA-capable GPU.

Config.Name: API Port
Config.Description: The port for the Demucs Server REST API (defaulted to 8020)

Config.Name: Cache Directory
Config.Description: Location for downloaded model weights (Demucs, Whisper, Crepe) and transient audio caches.

Config.Name: PORT Env
Config.Description: Internal port the Demucs server listens to inside the container

Config.Name: SLOPSMITH_DEMUCS_CACHE Env
Config.Description: Internal cache directory path (backward compatibility with upstream)
